mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM todos WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (user_id, title, description, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM todos WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
